nasb.text: and from the sons of Elizaphan, Shimri and Jeiel; and from the sons of Asaph, Zechariah and Mattaniah;

esv.text: and of the sons of Elizaphan, Shimri and Jeuel; and of the sons of Asaph, Zechariah and Mattaniah;

cnv.text: 以利撒反的子孫申利和耶利；亞薩的子孫撒迦利亞和瑪探雅；

ccb.text: 以利撒反宗族有申利和耶利，亚萨宗族有撒迦利雅和玛探雅，
